items.title: 本周，联邦快递（FedEx）将开启财报季，关键在于石油价格。
items.summary: 本周FedEx和零售名牌如Lululemon和Macy的财报将公布，我们可能会听到更多关于消费者态度的信息，因为汽油价格和运费成本在飙升，而中东冲突也在扩大。
items.title_en: ‘It’s all about oil’ as FedEx kicks off earnings this week
items.summary_en: With results due this week from FedEx and retail names like Lululemon and Macy’s, we’ll likely hear more about consumers’ attitudes, as gas prices and shipping costs spike and the conflict widens in the Middle East.

items.title_en: Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
items.summary_en: Some countries have imposed price caps and released oil stockpiles to maintain energy supplies, while others are trying to reduce consumption.

items.title_en: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Strait of Hormuz: 'Don't need to worry about it'
items.summary_en: The Strait of Hormuz, the world's most critical chokepoint for oil shipments, has been effectively closed since the U.S. and Israel began the war on Iran.
